Advanced Map Viewer

Android maps GPS mapsforge user interface CSS HTML Java Java Archive Shell XML
H
Hila Shmuel <>
shvil before merging overlays to 2-3 overlays
Fri, 8 Feb 2013 23:50:46 +0200
The AdvancedMapViewer app utilizes the Mapsforge library to render vector maps and enables various functionalities to enhance user experience. Users can select different map files and render themes, view their current location, center the map to a specified GPS coordinate, and take screenshots in various formats. It also provides options to adjust preferences and cache settings, managed through an intuitive user interface.
